mapper.select: select a.insp_req_dt, a.insp_req_no, a.prodid, a.linecd, a.progcd, a.ordymd, a.proymd, a.lotno, a.itemcd, b.itemnm, a.prdqty, /* 💡 결과 테이블에 데이터가 존재하면 'Y' 표시 */ case when exists (select 1 from pd_insp_rslt_m r where r.cmpycd = a.cmpycd and r.prodid = a.prodid and r.insp_req_dt = a.insp_req_dt and r.insp_req_no = a.insp_req_no) then 'Y' else 'N' end as state from pd_insp_req a left outer join HSBA010T_TBL b on a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and a.itemcd = b.itemcd where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.insp_req_dt between #{insp_req_dt_f} and #{insp_req_dt_t} and a.insp_gb = #{insp_gb} and a.linecd = #{linecd} order by a.insp_req_dt desc, a.insp_req_no desc

select a.insp_req_dt, a.insp_req_no, a.prodid, a.insp_gb, a.linecd, a.progcd, a.ordymd, a.proymd, a.lotno, a.itemcd, s.inspcd, s.insp_ord, b.cdnm as insp_nm, c.insp_dt, isnull(c.sample_cnt, 0) as sample_cnt, isnull(c.errqty, 0) as errqty, c.bigo from pd_insp_req a inner join pd_insp_item_std s on a.cmpycd = s.cmpycd and a.itemcd = s.itemcd and a.insp_gb = s.insp_gb inner join hpba900t_tbl b on s.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and s.inspcd = b.code and b.cdgbn = '830' left outer join pd_insp_rslt_m c on a.cmpycd = c.cmpycd and a.prodid = c.prodid and a.insp_req_dt = c.insp_req_dt and a.insp_req_no = c.insp_req_no and s.inspcd = c.inspcd where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.insp_req_dt = #{insp_req_dt} and a.insp_req_no = #{insp_req_no} order by s.insp_ord asc
